name: Corky's Cole Slaw
recipeIngredient: 1 medium head of green cabbage, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred the cabbage and grate the carrots.
2. Dice the green pepper finely.
3. Mix the shredded cabbage, grated carrots, diced pepper, onion, mayonnaise, sugar, dijon mustard, cider vinegar, celery seeds, salt, and white pepper in a bowl until well combined.
4. Cover the mixture and refrigerate for 3-4 hours to allow flavors to develop.
